title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy no wifi [New]
scenario: Privacy Policy fails to load with "Something is wrong" error when WiFi is turned off in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi on the Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) on the Home screen.
expected: The Privacy Policy content loads and is displayed correctly.
